videos.title: Spider-man, Gewnom, Green Goblin and More!  Daily Spiderman MTG Spoilers
videos.description:
We kick off official Spider-man spoiler season with Green Goblin, Carnage, Electro, Venom and (of course) a ton of version of Spider-man!

Need Spider-man cards? https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

Need more spoilers? https://www.mtgpreviews.com
